title: Psiadia ceylanica
taxonomy: Psiadia ceylanica is classified within the family Compositae, which is now commonly known as Asteraceae. This plant is native to Sri Lanka and belongs to the genus Psiadia. Psiadia ceylanica is a species of flowering plant that is part of the larger plant kingdom. It is a member of the clade Angiosperms and is further classified within the clade Eudicots. Psiadia ceylanica's classification is also aligned with the clade Monocots, though it is more specifically part of the subclade Asterids.
